source_pr.title: executor: fix panic when limit is too large
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

When limit is too large. `TopN.totalLimit` will overflow int and got panicked.

### What is changed and how it works?

Let `TopN.totalLimit` become uint64.

Let me know if you have better idea.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by name, id limit 18446744073709551615;") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by name, id limit 18446744073709551615;") (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by name, id limit 18446744073709551615;") (executor/executor_test.go)
